parameters.query: SELECT id, clerk_org_id AS "clerkOrgId", name, slug, status FROM organizations WHERE id = '{{$json.normalizedJobs[0].organization.id}}' AND clerk_org_id = '{{$json.normalizedJobs[0].organization.clerkOrgId}}' AND status = 'active' LIMIT 1;

SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS "existingCount", '{{$node["Validate Batch Schema"].json["batchId"]}}'::text AS "batchId", '{{$node["Validate Batch Schema"].json["normalizedJobs"][0]["organization"]["id"]}}'::uuid AS "organizationId", '{{$node["Validate Batch Schema"].json["checksum"]}}'::text AS "checksum", '{{JSON.stringify($node["Validate Batch Schema"].json["normalizedJobs"] )}}'::jsonb AS "serializedJobs" FROM ingestion_jobs WHERE organization_id = '{{$node["Validate Batch Schema"].json["normalizedJobs"][0]["organization"]["id"]}}'::uuid AND batch_id = '{{$node["Validate Batch Schema"].json["batchId"]}}'::text;

WITH jobs AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM jsonb_to_recordset('{{$json.serializedJobs}}'::jsonb) AS job(jobId uuid, organization jsonb, knowledgeSource jsonb, sourceRecord jsonb)
), inserted AS (
  INSERT INTO ingestion_jobs (
    id,
    batch_id,
    organization_id,
    knowledge_source_id,
    source_record_id,
    job_type,
    state,
    input_checksum,
    retry_count,
    created_at,
    updated_at
  )
  SELECT
    gen_random_uuid(),
    '{{$json.batchId}}'::text,
    (job.organization->>'id')::uuid,
    (job.knowledgeSource->>'id')::uuid,
    (job.sourceRecord->>'id')::uuid,
    'embedding',
    'queued',
    '{{$json.checksum}}'::text,
    0,
    NOW(),
    NOW()
  FROM jobs job
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM ingestion_jobs ij
    WHERE ij.organization_id = (job.organization->>'id')::uuid
      AND ij.batch_id = '{{$json.batchId}}'::text
      AND ij.source_record_id = (job.sourceRecord->>'id')::uuid
  )
  RETURNING id
)
SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS "queuedCount", '{{$json.batchId}}'::text AS "batchId", '{{$json.checksum}}'::text AS "checksum" FROM inserted;

parameters.jsCode:
const error = $json.error || $json;
return [{ json: { batchId: $json.batchId || null, received: true, acceptedCount: 0, rejectedCount: 1, queuedCount: 0, completedCount: 0, failedCount: 1, errors: [{ code: error.code || 'WORKFLOW_ERROR', message: error.message || 'Unhandled workflow error', jobId: $json.jobId || null }], checksum: $json.checksum || null } }];
